visual_description: Two men in suits sit across a table in a dimly lit room; one smokes while the other looks on. The smoker leans forward, holding the cigarette near his mouth, while the other man sits upright with hands clasped, facing him. Both are partially illuminated, with the background dark and indistinct.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a low pitch with a slow pace, accompanied by heavy breathing and a sigh.
